# Work Note

The useful shape here is a short design note whose paragraph
was wrapped by a model but whose authoring convention wants
the paragraph to live on one physical line.

- [ ] one task that keeps its marker
- [x] one completed task that also keeps its marker

The note ends with a normal paragraph that includes `inline code`
and a [reference link][ref] for parser coverage.

[ref]: https://example.com/reference
